name: Alphabet Class A
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $370.0350. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $367.5842 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $370.0350, stop $342.8964, target $393.6449. Risk/reward is 0.87:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
